column10: Cats' eyes are______________to light than human's eyes. (SENSITIVE)
column15: That's the______________Christmas tree I've ever seen. (BIG)
column17: The red blouse is not very pretty. The white one is much___________ . (PRETTY)
column18: Come and meet Ann. She's an old friend of mine. (I)
column19: Whose pen is this? - It is_________ . (JANE)
column21: He could______________hear what the soldier was shouting. (HARD)
